ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Clara Yang appeared via zoom for Corazon Motak (administrator).

Ms. Yang stated that she failed to appear at the last hearing due to the passing of her mother, that she had to travel overseas, and that she should have the petition filed before April 08, 2024. The Court discharges the order to show cause and without sanctions. Matter is off calendar. Status on filing petition is set for April 08, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Singh: Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Report Or Petition For Final Distribution By Nov-13-2023. Appearance Required On Nov-27-2023 Is Required If Nothing Has Been File.
Off Calendar Jan-31-2024 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Report Or Petition For Final Distribution By Nov-13-2023. Appearance Required On Nov-27-2023 Is Required If Nothing Has Been File.
Off Calendar Nov-27-2023 Continued To Jan-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear and Order to Show Cause will be issued to Clara Yang (Attorney) to appear on January 31, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why sanctions in the amount of $250.00 pursuant to CCP 128 should not be imposed against her for failure to appear. An Order to Appear will be issued to Corazon B. Motak (administrator) on January 31, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on closing estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Ross Moody: Clerk: Ateesh Datt: Deputy: Napata: Not reported.
